summary: Implemented the training calendar page (Tab 1) with month-view grid, training type color dots (push=blue, pull=green, legs=orange), month navigation arrows, training type filter tabs, day detail card with context-aware content (training start, completed summary, rest message, skip/unskip), empty calendar state, backlog workout option for past dates, and consecutive skip warning (>=3).
keyDecisions: Calendar page accepts props (plan, calendarDays, computeMonth etc.) instead of using hooks internally, enabling testability and future DI via context/provider
Separated calendar into 5 focused components: CalendarMonthGrid, CalendarMonthHeader, CalendarFilterTabs, CalendarDetailCard, EmptyCalendar
Date utilities in src/utils/date.ts provide calendar-specific helpers (getDaysInMonth, getFirstDayWeekday, getTrainingTypeColor) reused across components
Detail card content is context-aware: training days show start button, completed days show checkmark, rest days show message, past days without records show backlog option
Filter tabs dim non-matching days rather than hiding them, preserving calendar grid layout

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Month-view grid displays all days with training type color dots (push=blue, pull=green, legs=orange)
Clicking a date shows detail card at bottom with training info
Future training days show plan preview + start workout button
Completed days show green checkmark + training summary
Completed_partial days show semi-transparent checkmark + partial label
Rest days show no training scheduled message
Empty calendar (no plan) shows create first plan prompt
Training type filter tabs below month header
Start workout navigates to workout page
Record other sport navigates to other-sport page
Skipped days show grey dashed indicator

notes: Calendar page is designed as a pure presentational component receiving data via props. A future integration task will connect it to real DB via a context provider or hook wrapper. The component structure supports this pattern already.
